speaker: Narrator
text: In this web of deceit, alliances are forged and broken with each passing night, as the dimly lit shadows conceal the true intentions of its denizens. text: "Let's remember that fear can be our greatest enemy right now, folks. I've noticed some strange patterns, and we need to look deeper at those who are acting suspiciously. We should focus on building trust within the group."
